# OpenAI Status - March/April 2026

## March 31: ChatGPT Enterprise/Edu SSO Issues
- Elevated failures for some users joining ChatGPT Enterprise and ChatGPT Edu workspaces via SSO
- Login component experienced issues affecting workspace access through single sign-on
- Status: Resolved

## March 29: Account Creation and Login Instability
- Account creation and login are unstable across all surfaces
- Login service returned to operational status after users experienced authentication difficulties
- Status: Resolved

## March 26-27: Responses API and Sora Issues
- Elevated error rates affecting Responses service and Sora video generation
- All services fully recovered

## March 25: File Management Disruption
- Problems downloading and previewing project files
- File uploads component restored to full functionality

## March 24: Multiple Service Issues
- Realtime API SIP endpoints — elevated error rates
- Sync app creation and operation — increased errors and delays in Connectors/Apps
- Project and File Upload Errors — customers experienced errors creating and updating projects alongside file upload complications

## March 21: Pinned Chats Not Loading
- Pinned chats are not loading on web browsers for ChatGPT
- Conversations component affected
- Status: Resolved

## March 18: Sora Video Generation Failing
- Sora video generation failing
- Video generation component affected
- Status: Resolved

All incidents resolved with full service recovery.

Updated: 2026-04-01
